prompt: Create a premium e-commerce product advertisement in a clean botanical skincare style, featuring an open gift box of MONSTER 皮肤精华 centered on a light stone tabletop. The packaging is pale sage green and off-white with a minimalist luxury aesthetic, soft matte finish, and delicate watercolor leaf illustrations inside the lid and on the sachets. The box lid is open upright, showing elegant typography: the large brand line MONSTER 皮肤精华, a secondary line 7天舒缓肌肤, smaller Chinese copy beneath, and 3 small circular feature icons aligned horizontally in the center area. Inside the box, show exactly 4 flat sheet-mask sachets stacked on the left and exactly 5 slim glass serum ampoules standing in a row on the right, each with silver caps and vertical label text. On the front lip of the box, print the same product branding in small refined type. On the right side of the composition, place exactly 3 vertically stacked line-art benefit icons with bilingual labels: a leaf icon with 舒缓修护 and the English subtitle "SOOTHING REPAIR", wavy water lines with 水润保湿 and the English subtitle "HYDRATING", and a balance scale icon with the Chinese label "平衡肌肤" and the English subtitle "BALANCE". Surround the scene with a serene natural spa environment: soft-focus green branches entering from the upper left and upper right edges, moss-covered stones on both sides, subtle leaves in the foreground, and diffused daylight on a warm ivory background. Use a balanced front-facing composition, gentle shadows, high-end commercial lighting, crisp packaging detail, muted green palette, and a calm, trustworthy, premium skincare advertisement look.
